sceneDescription: The image consists entirely of a solid, uniform field of medium-dark brown. There are no subjects, textures, lighting gradients, or compositional elements visible within the frame.
colourNotes: The entire frame is a single, flat shade of warm, earthy brown, reminiscent of dry clay or milk chocolate.

strengths: Provides a perfectly uniform color field, which could be useful as a digital asset or background.

grounding_citations.title: Composition
grounding_citations.excerpt: The rule of thirds divides the frame into a 3x3 grid. Place key subjects or points of interest along these lines or at their intersections to create balanced, engaging compositions. This technique prevents overly centere

grounding_citations.title: Technique
grounding_citations.excerpt: **Critical focus** should land on the subject's most important feature (usually the eyes in portraits, the main subject in landscapes or still life). Use single-point autofocus for precision. Verify focus at 100% magnifi

grounding_citations.title: Subject impact
grounding_citations.excerpt: In portrait photography, genuine emotion outweighs technical perfection. Capture authentic expressions—joy, contemplation, vulnerability—not forced smiles.
